instruction:
The function \( y = (x - 3)e^x + C_1x^2 + C_2x + C_3 \) satisfies a differential equation ( ).

Options:
A. \( y''' = xe^x \)
B. \( y'' - 4y = 0 \)
C. \( y'' + y' = x + e^x \)
D. \( y'' + y' = e^x \)
E. y''' = 2xe^x - 3
F. \( y'' + y' = xe^x \)
G. y''' = 2xe^x
H. \( y'' + y' - 2y = 0 \)
I. \( y'' + y' = 2xe^x \)
J. \( y'' + y = x + \cos x \)
